properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm a soldier bound for glory, I'm a soldier going home; Come and hear me tell my story All who love the Savior, come

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: I will tell you what induced me. In the glorious fight to start: 'Twas the Savior's loving-kindness Overcame and won my heart.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I first commenced my warfare, Many said, "He'll run away"; But their words have been unfounded In the fight I am today.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm "a wonder unto many," God alone the change has wrought; Here I raise my Ebenezer, Hither by His help I'm brought.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When to death's dark, swelling river, Like a warrior I shall come, Then I mean to shout "Salvation!" And go singing "glory!" home
